name: aksarallm-1b-smoke

estimated_params_breakdown.comment: Smoke-test scaled-down variant for validating the 20B pipeline end-to-end on a single v6e-8 (8 chips, 32 GB HBM each). Keeps the same vocab (131072), GQA 16:4 ratio, and SwiGLU/RMSNorm/RoPE topology as the 20B config so the data + trainer + tokenizer paths exercise identical code. Parameters: per-layer attn (GQA 16:4, Q+O = 2*d*n_heads*head_dim = 8,388,608; K+V = 2*d*n_kv*head_dim = 2,097,152) = 10,485,760; per-layer SwiGLU FFN (3 * d * n_inner) = 37,748,736; per-layer norms (2 * d) = 4096; per-layer total = 48,238,592. 12 layers = 578,863,104. Tied embedding (V * d) = 268,435,456. Final RMSNorm = 2048. Grand total = 847,300,608 (~0.85 B). Good for pipeline validation, not for real model quality.

notes: Smoke-test config only: validates data-loader + EasyDeL trainer + checkpointing end-to-end on v6e-8.
Do NOT use this for a real model release. Use aksara_20b_dense.json on v5p-64+ for the real training run.
